base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of coin_tile_palette3 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Background coin tile — static version (placed directly into tilemap). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Background coin tile — static version (placed directly into tilemap); different from collectible coin sprite which has 4-frame spin (see sheet_003)
